items.title: Airlines can cancel flights in advance over fuel shortages under new plans
items.summary: Ministers hope move would help avoid last-minute flight cancellations for passengers this summer over Middle East fuel supplies.

items.title: The U.S. Set Off a Corruption Scandal That Is Gripping Mexico
items.summary: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican governor has spotlighted cartel corruption, strained cross-border relations and handed President Claudia Sheinbaum a thorny choice.

items.title: Sleepless in Tehran as crowds rally behind the flag
items.summary: A slogan on a wall nearby in Farsi read, “Meydan bashuma, khayabane ba ma.” ‘The battlefield is yours. The streets are ours.’ Addressed to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps...
